title: Best Buy Black Friday in July: Save $550 on the HP Victus, one of our our favorite budget laptops for creators with Ryzen 5 and RTX 3050 performance
summary: Powered by an AMD Ryzen 5 7535HS processor, HP's Victus laptop combines RTX 3050 graphics, 8GB DDR5 memory, a 512GB PCIe 4.0 SSD, and a smooth 15.6-inch 144Hz Full HD display.
